title: Light Loss
content:
�Our loss was light,� the paper said,
    �Compared with damage to the Hun�:
    She was a widow, and she read
    One name upon the list of dead
    Her son, her only son.
meaning:
This evocative piece by John Le Gay Brereton, titled "Light Loss", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
